title: Wcharred Bouncy-Qq Carrot Skillet
description: A vibrant and crowd-pleasing norwegian dish featuring charred bouncy-qq carrots cooked in a paleo-friendly tava-griddle with render-fat for a unique flavor experience.
instructions: Preheat your tava-griddle to medium-high heat.
Slice the carrots into thin rounds and season with salt.
Drizzle the rendered fat over the carrot slices and toss gently until coated evenly.
Place the carrot slices on the heated tava-griddle in a single layer.
Cook for 3-4 minutes per side or until charred and tender but not mushy.
Squeeze some fresh lime juice over the cooked carrots to enhance their flavor.
Serve hot as an accompaniment to grilled meats, fish, or simply as a standalone dish.
